3089850.name: RACING BROS: MAFIAS REVENGE
3089850.description:
Welcome to a new racing bros splitscreen party adventure that will challenge your skills once more.
This is the highly anticipated successor to the worst game on Playstation from 2019.

COOP MODE
Try the epic extraction challenge across the world that you probably won't survive.
You and your friends have to safely transport a huge golden ball from Morocco to China,
while the mafia is trying to steal it from you.

TIME ATTACK MODE
Become a time champion by getting the best speedster records in the time attack mode.
This is where you will use your best precision skills to get the best records.

PARTY MODE
Ready for more fun? Fight against or with your friends in crazy party modes by using one keyboard!
Stop the trucks, rooftop master, obstacles and many more to come!

Are you ready for some more racing bros?
3089850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
